nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
The last frame of you final result video will be shown here.
The image will be saved on the same folder as your video.

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values: Shift is set to "8" by default.  Feel free to change it and test new configurations.

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
-Set you Positive and Negative prompts for your audio here!

-Try setting CFG betwee 4 and 8.

-Try setting Steps between 50 to 100 for quality.

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
-Set you Positive and Negative prompts for your audio here!

-Try setting CFG betwee 4 and 8.

-Try setting Steps between 50 to 100 for quality.

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
-Set your seed, Steps, CFG and choose to enable/disable Audio

-Audio Enabler: remember to make your positive prompt on the MMAudio Sampler if you enable it!

-Seed: If your are not having luck with your results, try changing the seed.

-nag_scale: Should be between 11~50. Its set to 30 by default.

-Steps: More steps means better quality but longer generation time. Its set as "6" by default. Feel free to change it and test new configurations.

-CFG: More CFG means better results but longer generation time. Its set as "1" by default. Fell free to change it and test new configurations. Use values between "1" and "1.5".

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
-If you plan to use Audio remember to describe the audio in the Positive Prompts!

-Use the Negative prompts for the audio on the MMAudio Sampler

-You can use Adaptive Promtps! Check [Adaptive Prompts](https://github.com/Alectriciti/comfyui-adaptiveprompts) from more info

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
-Set your video Size and Upscale!

-By default its set to 480x720 with Upscale by 2.

-Default upscale method is "lanczos"!

-Set The lenght of your video (in seconds)

Feel free to change anything to fit your own specs.

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
-Set your seed, Steps, CFG and choose to enable/disable Audio

-Audio Enabler: remember to make your positive prompt on the MMAudio Sampler if you enable it!

-Seed: If your are not having luck with your results, try changing the seed.

-nag_scale: Should be between 11~50. Its set to 30 by default.

-Steps: More steps means better quality but longer generation time. Its set as "6" by default. Feel free to change it and test new configurations.

-CFG: More CFG means better results but longer generation time. Its set as "1" by default. Fell free to change it and test new configurations. Use values between "1" and "1.5".

nodes.title: Note+
widgets_values:
- Choose IMAGE2VIDEO if you want to make a video from an image!

- Choose TEXT2VIDEO if you want to make a video from text!

- Choose FIRST2LASTFRAME if you want to make a video using the first and last frame of a video!

- Choose AUDIO2VIDEO if you want to add audio to a video you have/made!

nodes.title: Resources
widgets_values:
[Encoder](https://huggingface.co/chatpig/encoder/blob/main/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)

[Clip Vision H](https://huggingface.co/calcuis/wan-gguf/blob/f52f5a1f0ba441d50277fb7cdd7c1b36611837f9/clip_vision_h.safetensors)

[WAN 2.1 VAE fp16/fp32/fp8_em4m3fn](https://huggingface.co/calcuis/wan-gguf/tree/ff59c62b6a008bc99677228596e096130066b234)

[MMAudio](https://github.com/hkchengrex/MMAudio)

[WAN 2.1 - Lightx2v Loras](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/tree/main/Lightx2v)

[WAN 2.2 - Lightx2v Loras](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Wan2.2-Distill-Loras/tree/main)

[Smooth Mix Wan 2.2 14B I2V/T2V Models](https://civitai.red/models/1995784/smooth-mix-wan-22-14b-i2vt2v)

[SmoothMix Animations WAN 2.2 - Loras](https://civitai.red/models/2040641/smoothmix-animations-wan-22)

[Stability Matrix](https://github.com/LykosAI/StabilityMatrix)
